name: Pasteurized Akkermansia MucT weight-maintenance randomized trial
summary: Randomized controlled trial testing daily pasteurized Akkermansia muciniphila MucT or placebo for 24 weeks after an 8-week low-energy diet in adults with overweight or obesity.
population: Adults with overweight or obesity who completed an 8-week low-energy diet with at least 8% weight loss

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Live Biotherapeutics and Engineered Microbes because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers and safety in Adults with overweight or obesity who completed an 8-week low-energy diet with at least 8% weight loss. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
